race.description: Edwards Constructions Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: CHEF'S KISS (1) improving with racing and he won't get a better chance to get off the mark today from the low gate. Stuck on well with the 59kg to run fifth over 1175m at Albury. Trained locally and goes close. RAWANO (6) the barrier gods haven't been kind this time in and can return to form today from a good gate. Taken back from the outside alley and chipped away late to finish seventh over 1405m at the Sapphire Coast. Expect a big run this time. PASSING THROUGH (10) deep into the prep and made progress last start when third over 1405m at the Sapphire Coast. Will roll forward and can take a hand in the finish. ROCKABYE ROXY (12) produced solid figures second-up with an eye-catching second over 1205m at the Sapphire Coast. Clearly come back well and no surprise to see her win this second-up.
